intentional_test_features: Sudden collapse with shoulder tip pain, prior amenorrhoea, and vaginal bleeding, now with profound hypotension and confusion — tests recognition of ruptured ectopic pregnancy causing haemorrhagic shock, a maximal-urgency emergency

This is a bystander/roommate-reported case with a semi-conscious patient unable to answer complex questions — tests correct handling of third-party history and prioritising immediate 000 dispatch and positioning over extended history-taking

Tests recognition that a rigid, distended abdomen with rebound in this context indicates massive haemoperitoneum requiring emergency transport to a surgical/obstetric facility, not home management or reassurance

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
